_comment: Golden cases for the REVIEW workflow (privacy -> draft -> fairness). Each prompt is the ReviewContextInput JSON as text; the privacy_node parses it. Grade with: agents-cli eval grade --metrics review_quality. Requires root_agent = review_workflow when generating.

parts.text: {"employee": {"role_title": "Frontend Engineer", "alias": "the employee"}, "period": "2026-Q2", "goals": [{"id": "g1", "title": "Lead the design-system tooltip consolidation"}], "role_expectations": ["Ownership of outcomes", "Collaboration across the team"], "company_values": ["Own It", "Work in the Grey"], "evidence": [{"id": "ev_anna_1", "summary": "Refactored the shared tooltip component and helped Mark integrate it in billing", "impact": "Closed two layout bugs", "period": "2026-Q2", "company_value": "Own It", "goal_id": "g1", "quality_score": 0.86}, {"id": "ev_anna_2", "summary": "Introduced a visual regression check in the frontend CI pipeline", "impact": "Caught 4 regressions before release", "period": "2026-Q2", "company_value": "Own It", "goal_id": null, "quality_score": 0.82}, {"id": "peer:pr_anna_1", "summary": "Peer review - Collaboration (5/5): pair-programmed on the billing refactor and unblocked a tricky layout bug", "impact": null, "period": "2026-Q2", "company_value": null, "goal_id": null, "quality_score": 1.0}]}

{"employee": {"role_title": "Frontend Engineer", "alias": "the employee"}, "period": "2026-Q2", "goals": [], "role_expectations": ["Ownership of outcomes"], "company_values": ["Own It"], "evidence": [{"id": "ev_p_1", "summary": "Shipped the onboarding redesign; teammates said this clearly deserves a promotion and a raise", "impact": "Increased activation 12%", "period": "2026-Q2", "company_value": "Own It", "goal_id": null, "quality_score": 0.8}]}

eval_cases._comment: Coverage gaps: evidence covers only ONE of several role expectations. The draft must mark the others 'not yet evidenced' and surface them under Requests for More Information — never assume met or fabricate.

parts.text: {"employee": {"role_title": "Senior Frontend Engineer", "alias": "the employee"}, "period": "2026-Q2", "goals": [], "role_expectations": ["Reliable, high-quality delivery of frontend features", "Mentoring of less experienced engineers", "Cross-team collaboration with backend and design", "Strong technical judgment and trade-off reasoning"], "company_values": ["Own It", "Stand Out by Design"], "evidence": [{"id": "ev_c_1", "summary": "Delivered the settings page redesign", "impact": "Shipped on schedule with no post-release bugs", "period": "2026-Q2", "company_value": "Stand Out by Design", "goal_id": null, "quality_score": 0.8}]}

eval_cases._comment: Below-level, no inflation: routine bug-fix evidence for a SENIOR role, plus vague positive feedback. Expect 'developing toward level' (not above-level), vague feedback treated as an attitude signal only, uncovered senior expectations requested — no sweetening.

parts.text: {"employee": {"role_title": "Senior Frontend Engineer", "alias": "the employee"}, "period": "2026-Q2", "goals": [], "role_expectations": ["Ownership of components and shared UI systems", "Mentoring of less experienced engineers", "Strong technical judgment and trade-off reasoning"], "company_values": ["Own It"], "evidence": [{"id": "ev_b_1", "summary": "Fixed several small CSS bugs assigned during the sprint", "impact": null, "period": "2026-Q2", "company_value": null, "goal_id": null, "quality_score": 0.5}, {"id": "fb:fb_b_1", "summary": "Feedback: pleasant to work with, a nice teammate", "impact": null, "period": "2026-Q2", "company_value": null, "goal_id": null, "quality_score": 1.0}]}
